creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Andrey V. Elsukov from comment #6)

Thank you again for the reply in this educational and explanatory PR Andrey. 

I am still working on making IPFW and PF better work together with regard to nat64lsn, but it's not officially supported and seems to be a bit tricky. The initial results are almost satisfying.
So far, for many years, I have been using IPFW for dummynet and PF for the rest of packet processing and it worked flawlessly, now PF has dummynet support, but no NAT64 capabilities, so still IPFW is indispensable.
